typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten procedure-compliance guidance so `followedProcedure` cannot be marked true when required test-first steps or mandated validator subsets are skipped; require explicit deviation entries whenever command sets differ.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review m11-scheduler-running-state-guard-and-registry-alignment found SKILL.md requires test-first and specific focused commands, while the fix handoff reported `followedProcedure=true` despite omitting part of the prescribed command set.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.target: mission AGENTS guidance and/or services.yaml policy
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify command-source-of-truth expectations: either require assertion-ID validator commands used in features to be listed in .factory/services.yaml, or explicitly allow supplemental feature-scoped commands beyond the shared catalog.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission AGENTS guidance says to use .factory/services.yaml as single command source, but the fix feature verification used VAL_EXEC_009/VAL_EXEC_013 filters not currently defined there.
